items.title: India-US trade deal: Brokerages decode key risks, market implications
items.description: Brokerages analyse the India-US interim trade deal, flagging key risks, tariff implications, rupee outlook and potential impact on Indian markets and the Nifty

items.title: SBI shares hit record high after Q3; brokerages raise target up to ₹1,300
items.description: SBI shares hit a fresh all-time high after Q3FY26 results beat estimates. Brokerages raise earnings forecasts and target prices to ₹1,300, maintaining buy calls

items.title: Nifty PSU Bank index rallies nearly 4%, hits new high; what's driving PSBs?
items.description: In the past one month, the Nifty PSU Bank index has outperformed the market by surging 7 per cent, as against 0.5 per cent gain in the Nifty 50.

items.title: Stock Market LIVE: Sensex gains 400 pts, Nifty SmallCap index up 1.5%; SBI lifts PSB Index by 3%
items.description: Sensex Today | Stock Market LIVE Updates on Feb 9: In the broader markets, the Nifty MidCap index gained 0.9 per cent, and the Nifty SmallCap index added 1.49 per cent

items.title: Crompton Greaves Consumer shares gain 4% on posting modest Q3 results
items.description: The buying on the counter came after the company released its Q3FY26 numbers on Friday, after market hours. Brokerages believe the company posted modest numbers

items.title: Tata Steel shares hit all-time high post Q3; brokerages raise target price
items.description: The buying on the counter came after most brokerages raised their target on Tata Steel post its December quarter (Q3FY26) results released on February 6, 2026, after market hours

items.title: Britannia Q3 preview: Profit may rise 18%; margins, volumes to improve
items.description: Britannia Q3 results preview: Brokerages tracked by Business Standard estimate Britannia's net profit to average ₹687 crore, compared to ₹581.7 crore a year ago, up 18 per cent year-on-year (Y-o-Y)

items.title: Sundaram Finance, Senores trading near breakout points; check strategy
items.description: Stocks to buy: Aakash Shah of Choice Broking explains why Schneider, Senores and Sundaram Finance should be on investors radar, highlights key levels to track.

items.title: Asia rallies as Japan shares surge to record peak post Takaichi's win
items.description: Japan's Nikkei surged 4.2 per cent to all-time highs, with investors expecting increased spending and tax cuts

items.title: Hitachi Energy, Nykaa shares turn bullish; analysts see up to 26% upside
items.description: Navin Fluorine, Hitachi Energy India and Nykaa shares show strong bullish breakouts. Kunal Kamble of Bonanza recommends 'Buy' as he sees up to 26 per cent upside in stocks in near-term

items.title: Emcure Pharma, Schaeffler shares look bullish; Osho Krishan suggests 'Buy'
items.description: Emcure Pharmaceuticals and Schaeffler shares show strong bullish technical setups. Osho Krishan of Angel One recommend 'Buy' with defined stop losses and target prices.

items.description: Nifty's relief rally revives bullish momentum with traders eyeing 26,000, while commodity volatility boosts MCX volumes and IPO market shows early signs of revival

items.title: FPIs turn net buyers in Feb, invest ₹8,100 cr in a week on US trade deal
items.description: The inflows follow sustained withdrawals in recent months, with FPIs pulling out ₹35,962 crore in January, ₹22,611 crore in December, and ₹3,765 crore in November

items.title: Worst week in 4 months: Claude casts a long shadow over Indian IT stocks
items.description: Indian IT stocks recorded their worst weekly performance in four months, losing over Rs 6.4 trillion in market capitalisation
